item.title: Confession Time...
item.description: I dislike her, especially as a Coloradan. I only leave voice-mail because they never pick up. Feel free to tell her your thoughts 202-225-4761 Edit: I keep it pretty PC and cheerful toned, so I doubt my tone or words are going to be viewed as harassment (i.e. be automatically deleted). I'm very careful of that :)
item.dc:creator: frogmanfonzo

item.title: Timon seeing a bear for the first time O.O
item.dc:creator: downriverrowing

item.title: Logo design for a pizza shop
item.dc:creator: Muppy

item.title: Dollar store trash ship!
item.description:
Hey yall, sorry! Last post glitched out but my girlfriend and I made a boat! It's for a pirate themed one shot we are having! ☠
We call it the Sapphire Serpent and we made it from junk we had lying around and junk from the dollar tree near us!
Collectively it probably cost us under 10 bucks to make!
This balcony removes so we can switch the lights off and on!
Inside the captains quarters!
How it all started! -Edit! I had some people mention it but you can find more of my girls art on Facebook and Instagram under Amber.escobar.art! -A one shot is a single story dnd campaign where we will play for a day then not run it anymore as I'm doing it for someone who's moving away and has never gotten to play -It took us about a week not counting minecraft breaks! -I will make another post later kinda giving the steps of how we made it! -I have some other things we built for it if anyone was interested in that!
item.dc:creator: Pengu3000

item.title: I gets to me sometimes......
item.description: I work on garbage and recycle trucks. Viral Edit: The joke is that I'm trying to seem unfaithful to my wife with someone at work, but I guess my humor/wording sucks. Yes, I could just wear a silicone ring if I wanted and I don't actually feel guilty, because it's for work. I leave my ring in my van and put it on when I clock out. It was just bait.
item.dc:creator: Saltierthanasaltinecracker

item.title: It's hecn warm
item.description:
The last few days have been hecn hot here in NL, I hope you are all staying hydrated!
Cat tax: Ms. Bean! Her favourite spot is behind the canvases on my desk :'D If you would like to see more of my illustrations you can find them on my Instagram (I don't post them here as much as I do there): https://www.instagram.com/revives_illustrations Or twitter: https://twitter.com/RevivesI
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

Man I love Ska
Been there

Terrifying
Mmm hmmm
Sorry
Justice is served
She protecc
I do NOT endorse this. I HATE celery
Have a great night, gang
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: He was so excited to be free
item.dc:creator: vidadobl6

item.title: Update for the 58 people that liked my post about my shitty boss.
item.description: Context: https://imgur.com/gallery/ik6Dhgw I had 2 really good interviews yesterday. One is in accounting (my degrees are in that.. I should take that one) and I'll probably make more than Adam. Haha. The other is at this cute little campground and i think thay could be exciting too, but not anything to do with my degrees. I feel a lot better about myself after this. It's like a huge weight has been lifted. I didn't realize how heavy it was to carry around all the belittling (spelling?) and negativity that came from my last few months there. I know now I should have left sooner. I need to treat myself better by not letting people walk over me. I feel really good today. Thanks for reading.
item.dc:creator: LostWingnut

item.title: An international treasure, a stick and a red puppet
item.dc:creator: MuffledGorillaViolence

item.title: Guys!!! I accepted!
item.description:
I make more than Adam now. Context:https://imgur.com/gallery/ik6Dhgw
Suit tax.. yes I changed in the woods I didn't have time between interviews. I just really wanted to show off my suit. Still fits after 5 years.
item.dc:creator: LostWingnut
